Project.title: Project
Project.description: A portfolio project uploaded by the admin.

categoryId.description: The category ID the project belongs to.

subCategoryId.description: The subcategory ID the project belongs to (optional).

imageUrl.description: The image thumbnail for the project.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the video, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: An admin user who can upload projects.

/projects/{projectId}.description: A collection of all portfolio projects.
